text:
itetcu      2009-10-18 06:17:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/py-apolicy      Makefile 
  Removed files:
    mail/py-apolicy/files patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  - remove files/patch-setup.py
  - replace the above with a ${REINPLACE_CMD} in the Makefile that uses the
  environment PREFIX
  Thus fix install the port when custom PREFIX is used.
  
  PR:             139539
  Submitted by:   Sahil Tandon
  Approved by:    maintainer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +3 -0      ports/mail/py-apolicy/Makefile
